steps: Variant Human does not exist in D&D 2024 (5.5e). The Human species was redesigned.
In D&D 2024, there is only 'Human' with a standard set of traits.
All Humans gain one origin feat of their choice at character creation (level 1).
You can choose any legal origin feat such as Lucky, Keen Mind, Tough, etc.
This replaces the Variant Human Ability Score Increase system from older editions.
